examples: Recombinant alpha-fetoprotein, method and means for preparation thereof, compositions on the base thereof and use thereof.
Objective to explore the relativity of alpha fetoprotein (AFP) increase in chronic hepatopathy and primary hepatocarcinoma (PHC).
Objective To test the sensitivity and specificity of alpha-fetoprotein (AFP) colloidal gold diagnostic strip as compared with RIA-AFP diagnostic kit.
The tests - for alpha-fetoprotein levels - cannot predict if the baby will have an abnormality.
